adaptations: The Python API normalizes the imported JSON through the stable DashboardDefinition model without changing the source-owned searches, panel types, options, or layout.
The live regression harness replaces only query strings in a disposable test copy, deriving rows from the upstream harness.json contracts.
The required splunk_health custom-visualization app is copied only into the disposable integration fixture and is never included in Python distributions.
entry.description: Eight-panel, glass-themed Splunk platform health dashboard using the upstream splunk_health custom visualization app.

enforcement: Pin the source repository revision and normalized definition SHA-256.
Reject runtime loading when packaged source content drifts from its lock.
lessons.summary: Treat external templates as immutable source inputs with exact readback evidence.

enforcement: Generate fixture rows from the eight upstream harness.json files.
Keep original SPL validation separate from disposable render-query substitution.
lessons.summary: Use visualization-owned field, formatter, no-data, size, and sample-row contracts for QA.

enforcement: Require Splunk Enterprise 10.2 or later for app-qualified custom visualization types.
Install the custom app only in eligible disposable live-test targets.
lessons.summary: Custom visualization templates require both a product-version contract and an installed app contract.

enforcement: Assert each custom panel exposes a visible non-zero canvas within its panel boundary.
Capture full-dashboard and per-panel screenshots with animations disabled.
lessons.summary: Visual QA must cover canvas visibility, sizing, no-data behavior, themes, and screenshot drift.

origin.attribution: Splunk Custom Visualizations by Robert Castley, adapted under Apache-2.0.

entry.title: Splunk Health

adaptations: The eight source-owned SPL searches, data-source refresh settings, panel titles, and 1920 by 1080 layout are preserved.
Seven app-qualified Canvas panels are replaced with splunk.table and the license gauge is replaced with splunk.singlevalue.
All custom visualization options are removed so the definition has no splunk_health app dependency.
The live regression harness continues to derive deterministic rows from the pinned upstream harness.json contracts.
entry.description: App-free Splunk 9-compatible port of the eight-panel Splunk platform health dashboard using built-in Dashboard Studio visualizations.

enforcement: Pin the source repository revision and normalized adapted-definition SHA-256.
Regenerate the port deterministically from the pinned upstream definition.
lessons.summary: Compatibility adaptations remain reproducible source transformations rather than hand-maintained forks.

enforcement: Use only splunk.table and splunk.singlevalue panel types.
Declare no required Splunk app and validate on the pinned 9.4.3 target.
lessons.summary: Preserve operational questions and SPL when custom rendering is unavailable.

enforcement: Generate fixture rows from the eight upstream harness.json files.
Keep original SPL validation separate from disposable render-query substitution.
lessons.summary: The portable and custom variants share the same source-owned data contracts.

origin.attribution: Splunk Custom Visualizations by Robert Castley, compatibility port adapted under Apache-2.0.

entry.title: Splunk Health (Portable)
